title: Capability Manifest
description: Industry-agnostic contract between the build-time Onboarding Agent and the runtime Help-Agent Service. Describes the capabilities of a customer app: roles, entities, actions, routes, glossary, and KB configuration.

schemaVersion.description: Pinned manifest schema version. Any breaking change to the contract requires a major bump and a coordinated release across onboarding + runtime.

roles.description: User roles known to the app, with their permission scopes.

entities.description: Domain entities the app manages (e.g., Booking, Invoice, Client).

actions.description: Discrete user actions the app exposes. Each action is grounded by a verb, a target entity, a route, and the roles required to perform it.

routes.description: Top-level routes/screens the user can navigate to. Used by the runtime agent to localize guidance against the user's current route.

glossary.description: Domain-specific vocabulary the agent should understand and use.

id.description: Snake-case identifier (lowercase ASCII, digits, underscores; must start with a letter).

fieldType.description: A primitive scalar type, or a `ref:<entityId>` reference to another entity defined in this manifest. The referenced entityId must follow the snake-case identifier pattern.

id.description: Stable identifier for the customer app (e.g., 'salon-pro').

name.description: Human-friendly name displayed to end users.

version.description: App version string (typically semver). Used for ticket payloads and KB matching.

permissions.description: Permission scopes for this role. '*' grants all; '<entity>.*' grants all on an entity; '<entity>.<verb>' grants a single verb.

synonyms.description: Alternative terms users might use for this entity (e.g., 'appointment', 'reservation').

fields.description: Fields on the entity that the agent should understand for guidance and validation hints.

required.description: Whether the field is required when creating/updating the entity.

entity.description: ID of the entity this action operates on. Must cross-reference an entry in entities[].id (not enforced by schema).

route.description: App route where this action is performed.

requiredRoles.description: Role IDs allowed to perform the action. Cross-references roles[].id (not enforced by schema).

preconditions.description: Human-readable preconditions the agent should mention before guiding the user.

deepLink.description: Optional free-form path with optional query and template tokens (e.g., '/bookings/new?prefill={...}'). Template tokens are app-specific and are interpreted by the runtime widget.

path.description: Route path (must start with '/'). Supports framework-specific param syntax (e.g., '/bookings/:id').

description.description: Short description of what this route shows or does.

entity.description: Optional primary entity rendered on this route. Cross-references entities[].id (not enforced by schema).

primaryActions.description: Primary action IDs available on this route. Cross-references actions[].id (not enforced by schema).

term.description: Domain term as users say it.

docsPath.description: Path (relative to the customer app repo root) where help markdown lives.

indexFormat.description: KB index format. 'frontmatter+keyword' is the only MVP format; the enum is left open for future formats.
